授業方法: This course will be conducted mostly on campus.   Students will read and analyze paragraphs and essays, and learn or review the grammar, language, and organizational features of academic writing.  Writing will be taught as a process with attention to pre-writing, multiple draft writing, and peer-review.

第2回:
Core Week 1: Paragraph structure; brainstorming & pre-writing 
Face-to-face class
《90minutes》
Complete Venn diagrams pre-writing task (approximately 1 hour)
第3回:
Core Week 2: Comparison-contrast paragraph: diagramming and using comparatives 
Face-to-face class
《90minutes》
第4回:
Core Week 3: Comparison-contrast paragraph: draft review 
Face-to-face class
《90minutes》
第5回:
Core Week 4: Comparison-contrast paragraph: review and revisions 
Face-to-face class
《90minutes》
第6回:
Core Week 5: Research essays: example and essay structure analysis 
Face-to-face class
《90minutes》
第7回:
Flex Hours: Pre-writing: choosing a topic and outlining the basic structure
Online class (on-demand)
《90minutes》
第8回:
Core Week 6: Forming research questions, finding and evaluation outside sources 
Face-to-face class
《90minutes》
第9回:
Core Week 7: Integrating outside source material. Essay draft writing 
Face-to-face class
《90minutes》
Complete the essay body paragraphs (approximately 2 hours)(approximately 1 hour)
第10回:
Core Week 8: Writing introductions and conclusions 
Face-to-face class
《90minutes》
Complete the essay introduction and conclusion paragraphs (approximately 2 hours)
第11回:
Core Week 9: Hedging, citations & references 
Face-to-face class
《90minutes》
Add citations and reference list (approximately 1 hour)
第12回:
Core Week 10: Presenting essay ideas / discussion leadership 
Face-to-face class
《90minutes》
Complete revisions and rewriting, as necessary (approximately 1 hour)
第13回:
Core Week 11: Essay: writing workshop 
Face-to-face class
《90minutes》
Make final revision to the complete essay (approximately 1 hour)
第14回:
Core Week 12: Writing for pleasure 
Face-to-face class
《90minutes》
第15回:
Flex Hours: End-of-semester writing 
Online class (on-demand)
《90minutes》

教科書/Required texts0: There is no required textbook.  The instructor will provide all class materials.
